notes: Core breakout mechanics work well with proper paddle angle control, multi-level progression, lives, and scoring, but brick collision resolution using previous-position inference can occasionally misfire on corner hits and the brick gap calculation looks slightly off visually.
An exceptionally well-crafted, flawless implementation of Breakout with perfect physics, state management, and audio.

A solid and complete Breakout clone with working start/launch/pause/levels and no obvious runtime errors, but collision handling is simplistic and can produce imperfect bounces that keep it short of excellent.
